baselineOnly.label: tight coupling between ui components and business logic reduces maintainability
baselineOnly.originalText: Tight coupling between UI components and business logic reduces maintainability.

baselineOnly.label: implement robust authentication using nextauth.js or similar with secure session management and csrf protection
baselineOnly.originalText: Implement robust authentication using NextAuth.js or similar with secure session management and CSRF protection.

baselineOnly.label: add rate limiting and input validation to all api routes handling payments or user data
baselineOnly.originalText: Add rate limiting and input validation to all API routes handling payments or user data.

baselineOnly.label: use react hook form with zod validation for all user-facing forms to improve ux and prevent invalid submissions
baselineOnly.originalText: Use React Hook Form with Zod validation for all user-facing forms to improve UX and prevent invalid submissions.

baselineOnly.label: adopt a layered architecture with clear separation between api routes, business logic, and data access layers
baselineOnly.originalText: Adopt a layered architecture with clear separation between API routes, business logic, and data access layers.

baselineOnly.label: optimize database queries by selecting only required fields and adding appropriate indexes on frequently queried columns
baselineOnly.originalText: Optimize database queries by selecting only required fields and adding appropriate indexes on frequently queried columns.

baselineOnly.label: cache static and semi-static content (e.g., pricing pages) using isr or cdn caching strategies
baselineOnly.originalText: Cache static and semi-static content (e.g., pricing pages) using ISR or CDN caching strategies.

baselineOnly.label: ensure all client-side error messages are user-friendly and do not leak internal system details
baselineOnly.originalText: Ensure all client-side error messages are user-friendly and do not leak internal system details.

baselineOnly.label: store sensitive configuration (api keys, webhook secrets) in environment variables and never expose them to the client
baselineOnly.originalText: Store sensitive configuration (API keys, webhook secrets) in environment variables and never expose them to the client.
